metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

  • Lean 4 library (lake build): operational gate g(τₛ), band lemmas, Feigenbaum reduction statement (partial).
  • Python reference core + golden rational bridge + pytest.
  • Public falsifiable predictions, experimental protocol, and epistemic labels separating theorems, conjectures, empirical claims, and ontology.

Companion production package: PyPI systemictau. Corpus DOI (prior archive): 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 are Feigenbaum-motivated defaults; a unique closed-form τ_ch = f(δ) remains open. Feigenbaum reduction still contains Lean sorry.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q.
